summary: 26 tests passed, 99.0% coverage, all quality gates passed

completion_promises.evidence: Created src/services/transcript_client.py with TranscriptClient class at line 92. Class has __init__ setting self.api = YouTubeTranscriptApi(), and all public/private methods.

completion_promises.criterion_text: get_transcript() async method fetches transcript with language fallback
completion_promises.evidence: get_transcript() is async, uses asyncio.to_thread() to call _sync_get_transcript(), which implements 4-step language fallback. Tests: test_get_transcript_success, test_get_transcript_calculates_totals, test_fallback_to_auto_generated, test_fallback_to_english, test_fallback_to_first_available.

completion_promises.criterion_text: list_transcripts() async method lists available transcripts
completion_promises.evidence: list_transcripts() is async, uses asyncio.to_thread() to call _sync_list_transcripts(). Returns list of dicts with language, language_code, is_generated. Tests: test_list_transcripts_success, test_list_transcripts_disabled_returns_empty, test_list_transcripts_video_unavailable_returns_empty.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Language fallback strategy: requested -> auto-generated -> English -> first available
completion_promises.evidence: 4-step fallback implemented in _fetch_with_fallback(): (1) auto-generated preferred language, (2) any English variant, (3) first available, (4) raise NoTranscriptFoundError. Tests: test_fallback_to_auto_generated, test_fallback_to_english, test_fallback_to_first_available, test_fallback_no_transcripts_raises.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Custom exceptions: TranscriptClientError, TranscriptsDisabledError, NoTranscriptFoundError, VideoUnavailableError
completion_promises.evidence: All 4 exception classes defined: TranscriptClientError (base), TranscriptsDisabledError, NoTranscriptFoundError (with available_languages attr), VideoUnavailableError. All inherit from TranscriptClientError. Tests: TestExceptionHierarchy (6 tests).

completion_promises.criterion_text: TranscriptResult and TranscriptSegment dataclasses for structured responses
completion_promises.evidence: TranscriptSegment dataclass (start, duration, text) and TranscriptResult dataclass (video_id, language, language_code, is_auto_generated, segments, full_text, total_segments, total_duration_seconds) with proper defaults. Tests: TestTranscriptSegment, TestTranscriptResult.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Async wrappers use asyncio.to_thread() for sync youtube-transcript-api calls
completion_promises.evidence: Both get_transcript() and list_transcripts() use asyncio.to_thread() to delegate to _sync_get_transcript and _sync_list_transcripts respectively. Tests: test_get_transcript_uses_asyncio_to_thread, test_list_transcripts_uses_asyncio_to_thread (verify via wraps mock).

completion_promises.criterion_text: CancelledError caught, logged, and re-raised (never swallowed)
completion_promises.evidence: Both get_transcript() and list_transcripts() have except asyncio.CancelledError blocks that log with logger.info() and then raise. Tests: test_get_transcript_reraises_cancelled, test_list_transcripts_reraises_cancelled.
